name: moonwalk-skill
description: Claude Code plugin for Michael Jackson mood-based recommendations and quick song opening

interface.shortDescription: Recommend the right Michael Jackson song for the moment and open it fast
interface.longDescription: Moonwalk Skill is a Claude Code plugin for Michael Jackson music discovery. It reads simple mood cues, recommends 2-4 fitting MJ songs, adds a brief emotionally aware line when useful, and opens the selected track through supported music providers.
interface.defaultPrompt: I'm tired. Recommend the right Michael Jackson song for this mood, or open a specific MJ track.
